summary: Phase 2 testing: 5 new modules (Inscripciones, Entrenamientos, Estadísticas, Comunicación, Informes) + updated Dashboard. Backend pytest: 20/20 passing (inscription CRUD + sibling detection + to-player conversion, training CRUD with asistencia counts, stats CRUD, communications CRUD, dashboard exposes proximos_entrenamientos + inscripciones_pendientes + inscripcion alert). Frontend smoke: all 5 sidebar nav items load their pages, Dashboard renders new 'Próximos entrenamientos' section + quick-new-training action, full create→list→delete cycle for Inscripciones works end-to-end against live preview backend.

issues: Console a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' on every DialogContent. Add a <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) for accessibility compliance.

design_issues.screen: Inscriptions / Trainings / Stats / Communications date fields
issues: Same Phase-1 finding still applies: native <input type='date'> used instead of shadcn Calendar/Popover – dd/mm/yyyy locale mismatch (insc-fecha-nac, training-fecha, etc.).

action_items: (a11y polish) Add <DialogDescription> to every Dialog in Inscriptions.jsx / Trainings.jsx / Stats.jsx / Communications.jsx to silence React/Radix accessibility warning.
(carry-over) Replace native date inputs with shadcn Calendar across new module dialogs (consistent with Phase-1 finding).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py inscription_to_player: instantiates a new Player Pydantic model from the inscription. If the inscription was created without 'nombre' (required), this would 422 — but the inscription model also requires 'nombre', so it is fine. OK.

server.py _detect_siblings: matches on shared progenitor phone/email/domicilio. Works as designed; minor risk: if multiple players share a generic email (e.g. 'info@club.eus' typo'd into a progenitor field) it could over-match. Consider trimming/lowercasing for comparison to avoid case-sensitive mismatches (e.g. 'Foo@Bar.com' vs 'foo@bar.com').
server.py /trainings PUT: receives full Training payload; partial updates not supported (consistent with rest of API).
Communications.jsx / Trainings.jsx / etc.: no per-resource DialogDescription -> a11y warnings.

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/20 pytest on phase-2 endpoints; total project 49/49 with phase-1)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on smoke flows (all 5 nav items load their pages, Dashboard updated sections + quick action visible, Inscriptions create/list/delete end-to-end OK, Reports dropdown switches reports & renders table headers, CSV+PDF buttons present)

seed_data_creation: Phase-2 tests create TEST_-prefixed team + 2 players + 2 inscriptions + 1 converted player + 1 training + 1 stats + 1 communication and clean them all up in TestZCleanup. UI smoke created and deleted 1 TEST_UI_Insc inscription.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run phase-2 backend with `pytest backend/tests/test_phase2_modules.py -n 0` (serial; module-scoped ctx fixture). Combined with phase-1 file backend_test.py the project has 49 backend tests all green. data-testid map for new modules: add-inscription-btn, insc-nombre, insc-apellidos, insc-fecha-nac, insc-p1-tel, inscription-save-btn, inscription-card-{id}, to-player-{id}, edit/delete-inscription-{id}; add-training-btn, training-equipo, training-fecha, training-hora, att-{playerId}, training-save-btn, edit/delete-training-{id}; add-stats-btn, stats-player, stats-temporada, stats-partidos, stats-goles, stats-asistencias, stats-valoracion, stats-save-btn, edit/delete-stats-{id}; add-comm-btn, comm-tipo, comm-dest, comm-canal, comm-asunto, comm-mensaje, comm-enviado, comm-save-btn, edit/delete-comm-{id}; report-select, report-filter-team, report-filter-cat, export-csv-btn, export-pdf-btn; Dashboard: quick-new-training, upcoming-training-{id}, alert-inscripcion. Sidebar: sidebar-nav-inscriptions/-trainings/-stats/-communications/-reports.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. Sibling detection via progenitor phone confirmed working (TEST_Aitor matched via shared phone). Inscription→Player conversion sets player_id + estado=aceptada and is idempotent (second call returns 400 as expected).
